textByHash.f26949a55f83d142c26c6e21de96696403cccaad: No way, I'm out of here just as soon as I've packed up my stuff!
textByHash.12a61a80dbbd36654ca6d332c0d1236a686633f5: Yes I do. Thankfully we can cope with almost anything. Jaraah really is a wonderful surgeon, his methods are a little unorthodox but he gets the job done.
textByHash.55dbb3c810f5d36bd2e47c80769f2cfd35ea88de: I shouldn't tell you this but his nickname is 'The Butcher'.
